banner_matchers.value:
^
Hi, my name is : *(\w.*)
Here is what I know about myself:
Model: *(\w.*)
Serial Number: *(\w+)
Software Version: *([\d.]+)
Build Information: *\d+
Time In Last Call: *[\d:]+
Total Time In Calls: *[\d:]+
Total Calls: *\d+
SNTP Time Service: *\w+ 
Local Time is: .* ([-+]\d\d\d\d)
